## Problem you're trying to solve

<!-- What's missing or awkward today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- High level — what would the feature look like from the user's perspective? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Why is this proposal better than the obvious alternatives? -->

## Scope check

Before opening, please check this against the project's stated goals/non-goals in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md):

- [ ] This fits within URSA-OSCAR's goals (CPAP analytics, MCP integration, subjective-objective correlation, single-user homelab)
- [ ] This is not in the non-goals list (multi-tenant SaaS, clinical-grade certification, replacing clinician oversight)

If it doesn't fit cleanly, that's fine — explain in "Problem" why you think the scope should expand.

## Phase / roadmap alignment

URSA-OSCAR has a phased roadmap. Optional — does your feature fit into:

- [ ] Phase 3 (Manual logging + correlation tools + Trends + bulk export — in progress)
- [ ] Phase 4 (Watcher service activation + provider PDF reports + advanced analytics)
- [ ] Phase 5+ (Predictive modeling, multi-variate correlation, etc.)
- [ ] Unsure — happy for maintainer guidance
